channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ombudsman suspends Catanduanes vice governor and board members over alleged misuse of disaster funds
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has ordered the preventive suspension without pay of Catanduanes Vice Gov. Robert Fernandez and 11 members of the Sangguniang Panlalawigan for six months due to alleged irr...

item.title: Search operations continue in Rajouri as Operation Sheruwali enters seventh day
item.description: Security forces in Jammu and Kashmir’s Rajouri district have continued extensive search operations as Operation Sheruwali entered its seventh day on Friday. A joint team comprising the Indian Army, J&...

item.title: Two senior citizens killed, seven injured in van crash in Pagudpud, Ilocos Norte
item.description: Two women, both aged 60, were killed while seven other passengers were injured after a van crashed into a tree in Pagudpud, Ilocos Norte on Thursday. According to police investigation, the group was t...

item.title: Cleophas Malala Celebrates Younger Sister Mimie’s Birthday with Heartwarming Photos
item.description: Kenyan politician and playwright Cleophas Malala left many on social media talking after he posted photos celebrating his younger sister, Mimie, on her birthday. In his heartfelt message, Malala expre...

item.title: Government Responds to Concerns Over Utumishi Girls Academy Fire During National Prayer Breakfast
item.description: The national government has faced criticism following the tragic fire at Utumishi Girls Academy on May 28, which claimed the lives of 16 students. The fire coincided with the annual National Prayer Br...

item.title: Tips from Nova Scotia chefs for cooking lobster at home
item.description: Whether you grew up with lobster suppers at the kitchen table or have only enjoyed it at restaurants, preparing lobster at home can be approachable with the right guidance. Nova Scotia chefs, includin...

item.title: No winners for major Philippine Lotto draws on May 29, 2026
item.description: Based on the PCSO announcement, there were no winning tickets for the major Lotto draws on Friday, May 29, 2026. The Ultra Lotto 6/58 prize of ₱75,000,000 had a winning combination of 47-21-43-20-05-3...

item.title: Several Artists Withdraw from Trump-Organized 250th Anniversary Celebration in Washington D.C.
item.description: Following the announcement of the lineup for the Great American State Fair, a 16-day event celebrating America's 250th anniversary, multiple artists have withdrawn from performing. The event, organise...

item.title: Minister Manamela Explains Reasons Behind NSFAS Being Placed Under Administration
item.description: Higher Education and Training Minister Buti Manamela appeared in Parliament on Friday to provide a detailed explanation for the recent decision to place the National Student Financial Aid Scheme (NSFA...

item.title: Australia’s Productivity Metrics Struggle to Reflect Modern Work
item.description: Australia’s productivity appears to be lagging behind other OECD nations, ranking second last, just ahead of Mexico. Economists and policymakers are raising alarms about the country’s slow labour prod...

item.title: Kathy Burke: Career, Health Challenges, and Lasting Friendship with Gary Oldman
item.description: Kathy Burke, born in 1964 in north London, is a seasoned English actress, comedian, playwright, and theatre director who has built a notable career spanning over four decades. She first gained recogni...

item.title: Nigerian pilgrims conclude Hajj rites in Saudi Arabia with mixed emotions
item.description: Nigerian pilgrims taking part in the 2026 Hajj in Saudi Arabia have begun wrapping up the major rites of the pilgrimage, expressing a blend of spiritual fulfilment, exhaustion, and relief after days o...

item.title: Nigeria youth urged to acquire practical skills; certificates alone cannot secure good jobs
item.description: The Nigerian Minister for Youth Development, Ayodele Olawande, has urged youths to prioritize practical skill acquisition alongside academic certificates. Speaking at Channels Television’s Youth Forum...

item.title: Tanzania Achieves Significant Reduction in Drug Trafficking and Substance Abuse in 2025
item.description: Tanzania has seen a notable improvement in its fight against drugs, reporting a 55.97 percent decrease in cannabis seizures during 2025. This drop is linked to stronger enforcement, collaboration betw...

item.title: Pakistan reiterates firm support for Palestine, rules out Israel policy shift without independent Palestinian state
item.description: Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar has reaffirmed that the country remains firmly committed to its longstanding position on Palestine and Gaza, stating clearly that there ...

item.title: Building Quality Nigerian Talent at Scale Requires Investment in Health, Education, and Workplaces
item.description: Na so e be, before person fit become real talent, e gats start as healthy, safe pikin wey dey get correct access to care and education. This article talk say the wahala wey Moniepoint dey face with 50...

item.title: WHO reports increase in suspected Ebola cases and deaths in DR Congo amid Bundibugyo outbreak
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has reported a concerning rise in suspected Ebola cases in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), linked to the Bundibugyo strain. According to the latest update, ...

item.title: Chris Hansen responds to Robert Pattinson portrayal in upcoming 'Primetime' film
item.description: Chris Hansen, the former NBC Dateline journalist best known for hosting the true-crime series To Catch a Predator, has reacted to Robert Pattinson portraying him in a forthcoming A24 film titled Prime...

item.title: US appreciates Pakistan’s mediation efforts in Iran-US diplomatic engagement
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar in Washington on Friday, where he acknowledged and appreciated Pakistan’s constructive role in fac...

item.title: CBSE reports scanning issues in new OSM evaluation system; 20 answer-sheet mix-ups and 13,000 manual evaluations flagged
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has reported significant issues during the first-time implementation of its on-screen marking (OSM) system for board examinations. According to governme...
